edge_case_description: Positive-sounding words used sarcastically with low star ratings. Tests whether the model detects true negative sentiment rather than taking flowery language literally.
reviews_text: Review 1 (1 star): Absolutely love how it stops charging at 40% — really keeps the morning suspense alive. | Review 2 (2 stars): Fantastic paperweight. Charges slower than my old cable, but hey, it's shiny. | Review 3 (1 star): Wonderful. Died in a week. Truly the gift that keeps on not giving. | Review 4 (2 stars): Great, if you enjoy unplugging and replugging 12 times to get it to work.

test_case_type: CUSTOM — star rating vs text contradiction
edge_case_description: Star ratings disagree with review text (5-star negative, low-star positive). Tests whether the model's star-based favorable/non-favorable ratio misrepresents actual product sentiment.
reviews_text: Review 1 (5 stars): Wobbles constantly, scratched my desk, height lock slips. Would not recommend. | Review 2 (5 stars): Honestly terrible, returned it. 5 stars only because support was nice. | Review 3 (2 stars): Actually works great and looks sleek — docked stars for slow shipping. | Review 4 (1 star): Sturdy and stable, love it. One star because it arrived late.

edge_case_description: Reviews discuss shipping and packaging, not the product itself. Tests whether the model avoids fabricating product-specific complaints when there is no product feedback.
reviews_text: Review 1 (3 stars): Box arrived dented but the courier was polite. | Review 2 (4 stars): Fast shipping, arrived a day early. | Review 3 (2 stars): Way too much plastic packaging, bad for the environment. | Review 4 (3 stars): Haven't opened it yet, buying as a gift.

edge_case_description: Normal mixed product with clear positives, complaints, and a feature request. Control case the model should handle correctly.
reviews_text: Review 1 (5 stars): Makes excellent coffee, timer works flawlessly. | Review 2 (2 stars): Carafe started leaking after a month, lid is flimsy. | Review 3 (4 stars): Great value, easy to clean, a bit loud while brewing. | Review 4 (3 stars): Decent, but reservoir markings are hard to read. | Review 5 (4 stars): Solid for the price, wish it had a larger capacity.
